name: Qdrant
description: A high-performance vector database for AI applications, enabling efficient similarity search.
longDescription: Qdrant is an open-source vector database developed in Berlin, Germany, launched in 2021. It is designed for AI applications, providing high-performance similarity search for embeddings and neural network encoders. Qdrant supports scalable deployments with Kubernetes and integrates with tools like Jina AI for enhanced search capabilities. Qdrant is a leading solution for semantic search and recommendation systems. Its open-source nature and European origin align with values of transparency and digital sovereignty.
features: Support for embeddings and neural encoders
Built in Rust for speed and reliability
